name: Capacity
simulation_meaning: How much mana a body can hold or channel before strain begins.

name: Control
simulation_meaning: How precisely the mage can shape effects without waste or backlash.

name: Recovery
simulation_meaning: How quickly the mage returns to safe condition after casting.

name: Strain tolerance
simulation_meaning: How much pain, fever, nerve pressure or organ stress the body can survive.

name: Discipline
simulation_meaning: Training, ritual procedure, battlefield composure and safety habits.

name: Specialization
simulation_meaning: Siege, healing, weather, craft, oath, scouting, counter-magic, signal or ritual.

name: Legal status
simulation_meaning: Registered, temple-bound, military-owned, noble-retained, guild-sanctioned, outlaw, enslaved or hidden.
